hero.headline: Traceability infrastructure anyone in the chain can start using.
hero.subheadline: Tracebud gives farmers, cooperatives, exporters, and buyers one shared system for origin data.
hero.subheadlineSecondary: Capture data once, control how it is shared, preserve provenance through the chain, and generate reusable EUDR-ready compliance records.
hero.supportingText: Built for fragmented networks and low-connectivity field realities.

whyTracebudSection.headline: Compliance should be easy to start, but strong enough to trust.
whyTracebudSection.description: Most supply chains do not fail because people do not care. They fail because origin data, evidence, and shipment records are fragmented across actors and tools. Tracebud creates a shared system of record so compliance data can move through the network without losing context or provenance.

simple.title: Self-serve by design
simple.description: Anyone can join, start a request, or begin capture without consultants or complex setup.

automated.title: Infrastructure underneath
automated.description: The data model, lineage, consent, and compliance records stay structured, reusable, and audit-ready.

inclusive.title: Inclusive by default
inclusive.description: Farmers can participate directly, even with limited digital access, shared devices, or spotty signal.

howItWorksSection.headline: Four steps. Self-serve from the start.
howItWorksSection.subtitle: From first request to reusable compliance records.

step1.title: Add your network
step1.description: One contact or five hundred. Upload a CSV or add them manually.

step2.title: Send one request
step2.description: Let it flow through the chain automatically, so the right request reaches the right actor without manual chasing.

step3.title: Collect origin data once
step3.description: Capture producer, plot, evidence, and consent data once, then reuse it across shipments and buyers.

step4.title: Stay aligned
step4.description: Keep everyone on the same page with a shared workflow and a structured source of truth.

productsSection.title: Two products, one shared operating layer.
productsSection.intro: Built for how fragmented supply chains actually work.

mobileApp.label: Mobile App
mobileApp.headline: Field capture that feeds the whole network.
mobileApp.description: Tracebud's mobile app is built for real sourcing conditions. Farmers and field teams can map plots, capture evidence, record consent, and respond through a simple mobile experience designed for low-connectivity environments. The result is structured origin data the whole chain can rely on.

features.offline: Works offline, syncs when connectivity returns
features.gps: Walk the boundary to capture GPS polygons

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.headline: Network infrastructure, not spreadsheet orchestration.
dashboard.description: Upload contacts in bulk, send one request, and let the workflow move through your supply chain to source. Track readiness, identify missing data, and assemble provenance-linked compliance records from one shared operating layer.

features.import: Bulk import contacts via CSV upload
features.bulkRequest: Send requests to hundreds of contacts at once
features.cascade: Requests cascade through your network to source
features.readiness: Track readiness across all network members

customersSection.headline: Because the best infrastructure is the kind people can actually start using.
customersSection.description: Reduce manual follow-up. Preserve provenance through aggregation. Move with more confidence.

gaps.title: Fewer proof gaps
gaps.description: Onboarding, evidence requests, duplicate checks, lineage, and compliance preparation in one connected system.

provenance.title: Provenance preserved
provenance.description: Compliance proof stays tied to real producer, plot, batch, and shipment records, not disconnected files and folders.

handoff.title: Faster handoff
handoff.description: Move from fragmented follow-up to shared readiness across the network, with less time lost chasing missing data.

inclusionSection.headline: Compliance should not leave smallholders behind.
inclusionSection.description: Big companies can buy complex systems. Smallholders should not be excluded because the tools are too expensive, too technical, or too slow. Tracebud keeps every actor visible, connected, and able to participate, even in low-connectivity field conditions or shared-device environments.
inclusionSection.punchline: We remove the access barriers that kept smallholders out.

finalCtaSection.headline: Make compliance usable for the whole chain.
finalCtaSection.description: Start with the network you already have, and give every actor a way to participate — without turning the process into paperwork theater.

pricingSection.label: Pricing
pricingSection.headline: Simple monthly pricing by network size.

thankYou.title: You're on the list
thankYou.description: Thank you for your interest in Tracebud. We review every submission personally.
thankYou.savedWithoutEmail: We saved your request for {email}. Our team will follow up by email.

timeline.submittedDescription: We have your details and will review your role in the supply chain.
timeline.followUpDescription: We will email you with next steps when Tracebud is available for your use case.
timeline.accessDescription: Waitlist members get first access as we open new regions and commodities.

thankYou.shareDescription: Know a cooperative, exporter, or importer who needs traceability? Send them to Tracebud.

exitIntentModal.headline: Start building traceability for your network.
exitIntentModal.description: Join the waitlist to get early access when Tracebud opens for your region and commodity.

waitlistDialog.description: Tell us about your network and we'll reach out when Tracebud is ready for you.
waitlistDialog.note: No spam, ever. Unsubscribe at any time.

sidePanel.tagline: Traceability infrastructure for the whole chain.
sidePanel.subline: Built for every actor — from field to export desk.

success.title: You're on the list

hero.eudrDeadline: EU requires proof of origin starting December 2026
hero.headline2: to stay connected to EU markets
hero.subheadline: From producer onboarding and plot mapping to shipment readiness and buyer handoff, Tracebud turns origin data into usable compliance.
hero.trialInfo: Free for producers. No credit card required.
hero.earlyAdopters: Join the waitlist for early access

footer.tagline: Simpler EUDR operations. Stronger market access.
footer.waitlistSubline: Be first to know when Tracebud opens for your network.

faq.title: Questions? We have answers.
faq.whenLaunch: When can I start using Tracebud?
faq.whenLaunchAnswer: Tracebud is opening in phases by region and commodity. Join the waitlist and we will email you when your use case is supported.
faq.whyCommoditiesAnswer: Coffee first, then the other six EUDR commodities: cocoa, palm oil, rubber, soy, cattle, and timber. See our pricing page for the full roadmap.
faq.howCostAnswer: Free for producers. Cooperatives, exporters, and buyers pay based on network size and usage. Visit the pricing page or join the waitlist for details.
faq.howLongAnswer: Producers can start mapping with the offline app right away. Most cooperatives upload their network and send the first request within a week.
faq.supportAnswer: Every waitlist member gets a personal follow-up by email. Once onboarded, you have direct access to our team for setup and compliance questions.

insights.title: Guidance for the whole chain
insights.description: Regulatory updates, field notes, technology explainers, and practical playbooks for EUDR traceability.
insights.empty: Articles are being prepared. Check back soon.

hero.headline: The agrifood operating system for equitable, verified, and compliant supply chains.
hero.description: Modular solutions for EUDR compliance, sustainability, and trade — built on offline field capture and a shared collaboration dashboard.

modularSolutions.title: One platform. Modular solutions.
modularSolutions.description: Start with EUDR compliance and add capabilities as your network grows.

eudrCompliance.title: EUDR compliance
eudrCompliance.description: Automated due diligence statements, satellite deforestation calibration, and TRACES filing.

esgCarbon.title: ESG & carbon reporting
esgCarbon.description: Scope 3 emissions, Cool Farm Tool integration, and sustainability clusters.

regenAg.title: Regenerative agriculture
regenAg.description: FSA digital wizard, continuous improvement tracking, and auditor portal access.

childLabor.title: Child labor monitoring
childLabor.description: CLMRS-aligned surveys, incident flagging, and remediation workflow tracking.

openChain.title: Open Chain model
openChain.description: Shared-risk sourcing with LIRP premiums, 5-year MoUs, and cooperative economics.

directTrade.title: Direct trade marketplace
directTrade.description: Verified listings, milestone-based escrow, and forward supply security.

platformCore.title: Two components. Every solution runs on both.
platformCore.description: All modular solutions are built on the same shared infrastructure — offline field capture and a collaboration dashboard.

fieldApp.label: Field App
fieldApp.headline: Zero-friction, offline-first field capture.
fieldApp.description: Map plots, record consent, and capture evidence in the field — no connectivity required. Data syncs automatically and feeds every downstream workflow.
features: Adaptive geolocation to six decimal places
Low-literacy onboarding via phone or magic link

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.headline: Unified command center for your supply chain.
dashboard.description: Visualize your network, validate evidence, run automated checks, and export compliance-ready records — from one shared operating layer.

chooseYourPath.title: Choose your path
chooseYourPath.description: Start with the workflow that matches your role in the chain.

farmers.label: Farmers & producers
farmers.description: Map plots and build a compliance passport with the mobile app.

cooperatives.label: Cooperatives
cooperatives.description: Coordinate members and roll up verified evidence.

exporters.label: Exporters
exporters.description: Aggregate batches, run checks, and prepare DDS filing.

importers.label: Importers & brands

sponsors.label: Network sponsors
sponsors.description: Sponsor exporter and importer networks with centralised oversight.

countries.label: Governments
countries.description: National traceability infrastructure without farmer lock-in.

threeResilience.title: Three kinds of resilience
threeResilience.description: Compliance opens markets. Regenerative practice keeps them open. Tracebud connects both with proof the whole chain can trust.

livelihood.title: Farmer livelihood
livelihood.description: Own your data, access more markets, capture once.

farm.title: Farm resilience
farm.description: Regenerative practices verified at plot level.

planet.title: Climate & biodiversity
planet.description: Deforestation-free chains and pathways to nature evidence.

whatsPossible.title: What's possible
whatsPossible.description: Tracebud is a network — any node can start a workflow.

brand.title: A brand requests mapping from a cooperative abroad
brand.description: Outreach flows through the shared inbox; farmers grant access when ready.

farmer.title: A farmer owns their GeoID
farmer.description: One capture feeds multiple buyers without remapping the same plot.

exporter.title: An exporter runs a pre-flight check
exporter.description: The full batch pool is validated before TRACES submission unlocks.

country.title: A country builds national DPI
country.description: Open interoperability avoids locking smallholders into one vendor.
